sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ حَسَنٌ البَابَ وَرَأَى جَارَهُ خَالِدًا.
sentences.translation: Hasan je otvorio vrata i vidio komšiju Halida.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan opened the door and saw his neighbor Khalid.

sentences.translation: Pozdravio ga je i pozvao unutra.
sentences.translationEn: He greeted him and invited him inside.

sentences.translation: Poslužio ga je čajem i slatkišima.
sentences.translationEn: He served him tea and sweets.

sentences.translation: Razgovarali su o kvartu i vijestima.
sentences.translationEn: They talked about the neighborhood and the news.
